title: ExtraStar USB C Plug Charger 20W, Dual Port Fast Wall Charger with Output 5V/3.1A, Mains Charger Compatible with iPhone XS/13/13 Pro/14/14 Plus/14 Pro/14 Pro Max, Galaxy, Pixel

features: Dual Port USB Wall charger: The charger plug adapter has adopted 2 in 1 design of two fast charging ports: USB-A and USB-C(output: 5V/3.1A; input: 100-240V), which helps to meet the differrent charging needs and enables you to charge 2 devices at the same time, spending less time and improving your productivity.

Fast Charging for iPhone: With output of 20W 3.1A, this High-Speed charging USB adapter provides enough power and fast charging up to 3X faster than the original 5W charger. It only takes you 30 minutes to charge your iPhone to 50%, saving your time and increasing the efficiency of your work.

Security&Multi Protection: The Type C charger fast charging block has built-in smart IC, overcharging, over-currents, over-voltage and overheating protection systems, multiple protections and automatic power-off after fully charged, to minimize battery aging caused by overcharging of your device. The USB wall plug equipped with Intelligent Output Adjustment technology, offers automatic recognition of plugged-in devices and charges them to their optimal levels.

Universal Compatibility: This power delivery charger compatible for most devices, such as iPhone Series: iPhone 14/14 Plus/14 Pro/14 Pro Max/iPhone 13/13 Pro /13 Pro Max /13 mini/iPhone 12/12 Pro/12 Pro Max / 12 mini/iPhone 11/11 Pro/11 Pro Max/XS/XS Max/XR/X/8/7/6/Pad pro/Watch, Samsung Galaxy S10/S10+/S9/S9+/S8, and more.

Lightweight and Portable: The USB C charger block has a compact body design and enhanced portability, can be easily put into your pocket anytime and anywhere. No need of any converter can be directly inserted into the socket, it’s convenient to use in home, office, hotel, travel in bed etc.
description: Features 1× USB-C (PD 20W) and 1× USB-A (QC 3.0) to charge two devices simultaneously at full speed. Intelligently distributes max 5V/3.1A total (single-port: USB-C 20W, USB-A 18W). Foldable UK plug design for easy storage in bags/pockets (great for travel).
